title: JPMorgan Chase Company Overview
text: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is one of the largest global financial services firms, headquartered in New York and operating worldwide under the J.P. Morgan and Chase brands. The firm serves consumers, small businesses, corporations, governments, institutions, and wealthy clients. Its major businesses include Consumer & Community Banking, Commercial & Investment Banking, Asset & Wealth Management, payments, credit cards, deposits, lending, investment banking, markets, securities services, and financial transaction processing. JPMorgan Chase is a leader in investment banking, consumer financial services, commercial banking, asset management, and payment infrastructure. For investment analysis, JPMorgan Chase is important because its earnings are influenced by interest rates, loan growth, deposit balances, credit quality, consumer spending, trading activity, investment banking fees, wealth management flows, regulation, and broader macroeconomic conditions.
